description_long: This is a rugged, mid-ankle outdoor boot with a robust and thick rubber sole designed for traction and durability. The upper is constructed from a combination of synthetic leather and mesh fabric, providing both structure and breathability. The shoe features a padded collar and tongue for comfort, as well as reinforced stitching along stress points. The lacing system uses standard eyelets and is secured with round laces, ensuring a snug fit. The exterior is predominantly matte black, with subtle textural variations between the synthetic overlays and mesh panels. The overall design suggests it is suitable for urban exploration or light hiking, offering both protection and support.
description: A sturdy, black mid-ankle boot with a thick, textured sole and a mix of synthetic leather and mesh panels, designed for durability and comfort.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the padded heel collar, heel pull tab, and reinforced stitching at the back.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the layered synthetic panels, mesh inserts, and the rugged sole profile.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the rounded toe, standard criss-cross lacing, and padded tongue.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the same paneling and tread details.
